query: SELECT id, userId, CHAR_LENGTH(tradierApiKey) as keyLength, LEFT(tradierApiKey, 8) as keyPrefix, tradierApiKey IS NULL as isNull, updatedAt FROM apiCredentials LIMIT 5;
